column3: Bio

SF – Hampton, GA – HT: 6-6 – WT: 205 – WING: NA – C’28 – A big time talent and one of the top recruits in the 2028 class, Williams can do it all on the court and plays both ends. He’s got a smooth game and makes it all look easy. PLAYER COMP: Jimmy Butler

SF – Toronto, Canada – HT: 6-7 – WT: 175 – WING: NA – C’28 – An elite talent with pro-level tools. Has to continue to expand his game and develop his perimeter skills but looks the part of a one and done type of talent.
C – NY (Burkina Faso) – HT: 7-1 – WT: NA – WING: NA – C-28 – A monster of an athlete with unique movement skills for his size. Is just barely scratching the surface of his potential.
SF – FC Barcelona (Spain) – HT: 6-9 – WT: NA – WING: NA – Int.10 – A long and athletic wing who can dribble, pass and shoot. Built in the Franz Wagner mold. PLAYER COMP: Franz Wanger

SG – Coatesville, PA – HT: 6-6 – WT: 210 – WING: NA – C’28 – One of the premier shooters in high school basketball with good size and strength. Isn’t a top shelf athlete but has lethal scoring ability.
C – Madison, MS – HT: 6-11 – WT: 230 – WING: NA – C-28 – An intimidating presence in the lane who does all the traditional big man stuff well. Is like a more advanced/modern version of his old man.

C – Bradenton, FL (Senegal) – HT: 7-0 – WT: 205 – WING: NA – C-28 – A breathtaking open court athlete who moves like a guard in a 7-foot frame. Touray has special athletic ability and is quickly developing as a basketball talent. He’ll have to add some good weight but you just can’t teach some of the stuff that he does on the court.

PF – Atlanta, GA – HT: 6-10 – WT: 195 – WING: NA – C’28 – A super talented big man with great ball skills, handles and shooting ability. Will have to get stronger but has a frame that can add good weight.

PG – Duncanville, TX – HT: 6-3 – WT: NA – WING: NA – C-28 – Anthony’s younger brother is a talented point guard with a great feel for the game. He doesn’t have the size that his older brother has but is still a big time prospect.
SG – Atlanta, GA – HT: 6-5 – WT: 175 – WING: NA – C’28 – The younger son of Jarvis Hayes, Myles is a big time recruit who looks like a future NBA player.

SF – Chandler, AZ – HT: 6-7 – WT: 190 – WING: NA – C’27 – A high level athlete who is making huge improvements to his game and jumping up the rankings. Has all the tools and is really putting it together on the court.
PG – Spain – HT: 6-7 – WT: NA – WING: NA – Int.10 – A tall ball-handling guard who can really score and pass the rock. A U.S born guy who is choosing to develop in Spain.
C – Spain – HT: 6-10 – WT: NA – WING: NA – Int.10– A well built center with natural strength and great size. Moves well up and down the court and excels at rebounding and doing all the big man stuff.
SG – Real Madrid (Croatia) – HT: 6-4 – WT: NA – WING: NA – Int.10 – A talented scorer and creator who is one of the top prospects in Europe. Has solid size and a great feel for the game.
SF – New Albany, IN – HT: 6-5 – WT: NA – WING: NA – C’28 – An impressive talent who looks the part of a future NBA wing. Makes the game look easy and is super smooth on the court.
SG – Lakeland, FL – HT: 6-4 – WT: NA – WING: NA – C’28 –

C – Canada – HT: 7-6 – WT: NA – WING: NA – C-28 – One of the tallest prospects in the world, Gohier is a game-changer at the high school level and seems to have enough athleticism at 7-6 to eventually play the pro game.
